attacking_style: Launches late attacks from small breakaways at approximately 1km to go, even on flat finales. Willing to take risks against numerical disadvantages when opportunity presents.
team_tactics: Often operates without team support in decisive moments, relying on individual initiative rather than coordinated setup from domestiques.
terrain_preference: Capable on flat finales when attacking from breakaways. Struggles in tactical positioning battles, particularly in small group sprints where positioning dominance matters.
vulnerability: Poor tactical awareness in small group sprint scenarios. Allows stronger tacticians to dictate positioning, negating any physical advantages. Ineffective when facing organized numerical disadvantages without element of surprise.
key_patterns: Attacks at 1km to go from small breakaways, documented in both races analyzed
Operates without team support in critical phases, forced to rely on solo efforts
Struggles with tactical positioning when sprint dynamics require spatial awareness and timing
form_trajectory: negative: Despite Giro stage wins entering 2019 Tour, showed tactical regression and inability to execute in pressure situations
